allow: PowerShell($env:ELECTRON_ENABLE_LOGGING=1; Start-Process -FilePath "npm" -ArgumentList "start" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\Users\\Brendan\\Documents\\nexus" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 12; $procs = Get-Process electron -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($procs\) { "Electron running: $\($procs.Count\) process\(es\)" } else { "No electron process found" })
